description: Firm Tail Hedge Overlay - reads the stress desk, factor risk model and firm book, then sizes a scenario-targeted convex protection sleeve so the worst modelled scenario is pulled back inside the soft loss limit. data/tail-hedge.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Firm Tail Hedge Overlay - daily 04:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the firm-risk-board (04:00), so it always reads a complete fresh risk stack.
